TH_SANAE-TEMP_REGEN_POWER.title: Temporary Regeneration
TH_SANAE-TEMP_REGEN_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, heal HP equal to your stacks. Removed when hit by attack damage.
TH_SANAE-TEMP_REGEN_POWER.smartDescripti: At the end of your turn, heal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP. Removed when hit by attack damage.
TH_SANAE-SINGLE_PLATING_POWER.title: Single-Layer Plating
TH_SANAE-SINGLE_PLATING_POWER.descriptio:
At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to your stacks.
Removed upon losing HP, and you cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for the rest of this turn.
TH_SANAE-SINGLE_PLATING_POWER.smartDescr:
At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
Removed upon losing HP, and you cannot gain [gold]Block[/gold] from cards for the rest of this turn.
TH_SANAE-BELIEF_POWER.title: Faith
TH_SANAE-BELIEF_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if your [gold]Block[/gold] is less than twice your stacks, set it to that amount; otherwise, gain an additional one-tenth of your stacks as [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_SANAE-BELIEF_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, if your [gold]Block[/gold] is less than [blue]{DoubleAmount}[/blue], set it to [blue]{DoubleAmount}[/blue]; otherwise, gain [blue]{TenPercentAmount}[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_SANAE-WIND_POWER.title: Wind Force
TH_SANAE-WIND_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, deal damage equal to your stacks to ALL enemies, then halve your stacks.
TH_SANAE-WIND_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies, then halve your stacks.
TH_SANAE-Y_C_POWER.title: Chanting!
TH_SANAE-Y_C_POWER.description: After {Amount} turn(s), play the designated card.
TH_SANAE-HOWLING_WIND_POWER.title: Wind Fills the Tower Before Rain
TH_SANAE-HOWLING_WIND_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon Wind[/gold] for the remaining turns.
TH_SANAE-HOWLING_WIND_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon Wind[/gold] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] remaining turn(s).
TH_SANAE-MORIYA_FAITH_POWER.title: Moriya Faith Convergence

TH_SANAE-MORIYA_FAITH_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold].

TH_SANAE-MILKY_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Sanae's Milk[/gold] to your hand.
TH_SANAE-T_H10_POWER.title: Mountain of Faith
TH_SANAE-T_H10_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add random [gold]Spell Cards[/gold] equal to your stacks with 0 cost, [gold]Exhaust[/gold], and [gold]Ethereal[/gold] to your hand.

TH_SANAE-ALWAYS_GOOD_LUCK_POWER.title: Miracle-Working Living God
TH_SANAE-ALWAYS_GOOD_LUCK_POWER.descript: Some random outcomes are always the best possible for you.
TH_SANAE-ALWAYS_GOOD_LUCK_POWER.smartDes: Some random outcomes are always the best possible for you.
TH_SANAE-INDUCE_POWER.title: Induce
TH_SANAE-INDUCE_POWER.description:
At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Faith[/gold] equal to your stacks, then halve your stacks.
Deal {TenPercentAmount}% less damage.
TH_SANAE-INDUCE_POWER.smartDescription:
At the end of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Faith[/gold], then halve your stacks.

TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE_POWER.title: Divine Lake Blessing
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE_POWER.description:
The minimum [gold]Wind Force[/gold] required to maintain [gold]Wind Rising[/gold] is reduced by your stacks.
While in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], [gold]Wind Force[/gold] decay is reduced by your stacks × 10%.
TH_SANAE-WIND_GOD_LAKE_POWER.smartDescri:
The minimum [gold]Wind Force[/gold] required to maintain [gold]Wind Rising[/gold] is reduced by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
While in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], [gold]Wind Force[/gold] decay is reduced by [blue]{TenPercentAmount}[/blue]%.
TH_SANAE-FAITH_FOR_NULL_POWER.title: Faith Is for the Phantom People
TH_SANAE-FAITH_FOR_NULL_POWER.descriptio: At the end of your turn, if there are no non-[gold]Minion[/gold] non-[gold]Devotee[/gold] enemies other than yourself, gain 1 [gold]Intangible[/gold].

TH_SANAE-MASTER_WIND_POWER.title: Ride the Wind
TH_SANAE-MASTER_WIND_POWER.description:
At the start of your turn, if you are in [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], [gold]Wind Force[/gold] no longer decays.
At the end of your turn, if your [gold]Wind Force[/gold] is sufficient to maintain [gold]Wind Rising[/gold], automatically enter [gold]Wind Rising[/gold].
